prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `963f59bc`.
codex_response:
Implemented `963f59bc` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: keep the color-1 template, and for each non-1 singleton seed, paint a copy of that template in the seed’s color; a seed to the right gets a left-right mirror, and a seed below gets an up-down mirror, with the seed landing on the anchored cell of the new copy.

The summary hint was usable and consistent with the official task, so I kept it. One detail the verifier had to handle explicitly is that the color-1 template can be split into multiple 4-connected components, so it merges all color-1 parts before mirroring in [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_963f59bc/verifier.py#L4). The generator in [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_963f59bc/generator.py#L6) stays on-family by building a small sparse blue template near the upper-left, adding 1-2 singleton seeds only to the right and/or below, and using mirrored motif variants without extra noise. No new shared primitive was needed.
